subcodes.first_line: Justice is, unto the Tree of sovereignty and grandeur, an everlasting fruit. The just king is the lamp of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عدل از برای سدره سلطنت و بزرگی ثمریست باقی پادشاه عادل مصباح عالمست
subcodes.subjects: @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @Manifestation of God as sun, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @status of kings; future of monarchy
